upstream_sources: Deterministic demo fallbacks when county has zero rows

alphaCategories.name: Live Data Advantage
alphaCategories.description: County-level liens, delinquencies, and pre-foreclosure filings change daily; free LLMs cannot cite current filings, amounts, or parcel-level joins.

alphaCategories.name: Screening & Ranking
alphaCategories.description: Composite distress scoring, sorting by amount or recency, and filters (tax sale scheduled, years delinquent, property type) shortlist actionable parcels.

alphaCategories.name: Cross-Market Comparison
alphaCategories.description: Side-by-side county rankings by signal volume and average exposure support capital allocation across metros.

alphaCategories.name: Signal Combination
alphaCategories.description: Opportunity finder explicitly requires tax-lien signal without concurrent foreclosure-type filings—a relationship free models cannot verify from memory.

crossToolOpportunities.combinedInsight: Distress-ranked parcels from LienLens plus contact enrichment yields prioritized outreach lists.
crossToolOpportunities.examplePrompt: Give me the top 10 hot residential parcels in Harris County and append owner names for skip trace.

upstreamGaps.gap: County websites and PDF dockets are fragmented; few offer clean multi-signal APIs with consistent schemas.
upstreamGaps.howToolLienLensFills: Single MCP surface with shared FIPS addressing, pagination, structured output, and optional composite scoring.

candidatePromptPool.prompt: List Texas counties LienLens supports and which have both tax and pre-foreclosure data.
candidatePromptPool.whyFreeCannotAnswer: Free models do not know your live coverage matrix or ingestion status for this product.
candidatePromptPool.realWorldConsequence: Avoids wasted spend on counties with no feed.

freeBaseline.response: Generic discussion of major TX metros without authoritative coverage flags.
freeBaseline.whyItBeatsFree: Only the deployed catalog reflects actual supported FIPS and data flags.

candidatePromptPool.prompt: Pull distress signals for Harris County TX (48201)—tax liens over $5,000 filed in the last 90 days.
candidatePromptPool.whyFreeCannotAnswer: Requires current filed amounts and dates tied to county records.
candidatePromptPool.realWorldConsequence: Targeting lists for lien investing or outreach.

freeBaseline.response: Cannot retrieve filtered county lien rows with verified dates and amounts.
freeBaseline.whyItBeatsFree: Tool returns paginated, filterable records with fetchedAt metadata.

candidatePromptPool.prompt: Show residential tax delinquencies in Harris County at least three years delinquent with a scheduled tax sale.
candidatePromptPool.whyFreeCannotAnswer: Needs joined delinquency + sale scheduling fields from operational data.

freeBaseline.response: Hand-wavy generalities about tax sales without parcel-level matches.
freeBaseline.whyItBeatsFree: Structured filters on years, property type, and taxSaleScheduled.

candidatePromptPool.prompt: List pre-foreclosure filings in Harris County in the last six months with breakdown by filing type.
candidatePromptPool.whyFreeCannotAnswer: Recency-bounded clerk/recorder-style data is not in model weights.
candidatePromptPool.realWorldConsequence: Pipeline timing for loss mitigation or acquisitions.

freeBaseline.whyItBeatsFree: breakdownByType plus paginated filings when data exists.

candidatePromptPool.prompt: Rank the top 15 most distressed residential parcels in Harris County by composite distress score.
candidatePromptPool.whyFreeCannotAnswer: Requires proprietary weighting and live signal bundle per parcel.

freeBaseline.response: Cannot compute ranked parcel list with scores.
freeBaseline.whyItBeatsFree: Returns scored, sorted structured properties with actionability hints.

candidatePromptPool.prompt: Compare distress activity between Harris TX, Cook IL, and Maricopa AZ—signal volume and average amounts.
candidatePromptPool.whyFreeCannotAnswer: Multi-county normalized metrics are not available to a free chat model.

freeBaseline.response: Vague macro comparison without consistent signal definitions.
freeBaseline.whyItBeatsFree: Single call returns ranked counties on shared methodology.

candidatePromptPool.prompt: Find Harris County properties with tax liens, at least two years delinquent, and no lis pendens or foreclosure notices yet.
candidatePromptPool.whyFreeCannotAnswer: Needs cross-signal negative constraints on the same parcel universe.

freeBaseline.response: Cannot verify absence of foreclosure-type filings per parcel.
freeBaseline.whyItBeatsFree: Explicit tax-lien-only opportunity filter in tool logic.

candidatePromptPool.prompt: Which commercial parcels in Harris County have scheduled tax sales this quarter?

issues: When DB returns zero rows, handlers fall back to deterministic demo fixtures (Harris-centric sample addresses). Agents should treat dataFreshness and source fields as canonical; empty DB + demo can look internally consistent but is not live county truth.

level2.upstreamComparison: Not executed against a third-party county UI in this run; recommend spot-checking top parcels against an official county search when DB is populated.

latencyAudit.schemaCompleteness: 7/7 methods have non-trivial outputSchema; all return structuredContent on success paths.

failures.rootCause: Context platform insufficient_allowance (Auto Pay disabled or $0); wallet/allowance not funded per skill prerequisites.
failures.fix: Enable Auto Pay and set allowance at https://ctxprotocol.com/settings; fund wallet per https://ctxprotocol.com/developer

generatedDescription:
LienLens delivers county-level real estate distress intelligence—tax liens, lis pendens, notices of default, notices of trustee sale, and tax delinquencies—in one MCP toolkit for investors, analysts, and acquisition teams. Point it at a five-digit county FIPS code to pull paginated filings, run composite distress scoring, compare counties side by side, or screen for early-stage opportunities (heavy tax-lien exposure before foreclosure filings appear).

Features
• Coverage map: list_supported_counties shows supported counties, data flags, and ingestion status (optionally filter by state).
• Raw feeds: get_distress_signals, get_tax_delinquencies, and get_preforeclosures return filterable, paginated county records with amounts, dates, and source attribution.
• Ranked analysis: analyze_property_distress scores and sorts properties using severity, amounts owed, and recency.
• Market comparison: compare_county_distress ranks counties by signal volume and average amounts (multi-county calls are heavier—use a small set of FIPS per request).
• Opportunity lens: find_distress_opportunities targets properties with tax-lien stress but no lis pendens / NOD / NOTS yet.

Try asking
• "List Texas counties LienLens supports and which have both tax and pre-foreclosure data."
• "Pull distress signals for Harris County TX (48201)—tax liens over $5,000 filed in the last 90 days."
• "Show pre-foreclosure filings in Harris County where the lender name contains Chase."
• "Rank the top 15 most distressed residential parcels in Harris County by composite distress score."
• "Compare distress activity between Harris TX (48201), Cook IL (17031), and Maricopa AZ (04013)."
• "Find tax-delinquent residential properties in Harris County at least three years delinquent with no lis pendens."
• "Which commercial parcels in Harris County have a scheduled tax sale?"

Agent tips
• Pass countyFips as a five-digit string. When FIPS is unknown, call list_supported_counties first.
• Use page and pageSize on list endpoints (pageSize max 200); avoid assuming a single page is exhaustive when totalCount exceeds pageSize.
• compare_county_distress issues sequential queries per county—treat it as a slow, multi-county operation and keep county lists small.
• analyze_property_distress, find_distress_opportunities, and compare_county_distress use higher execute pricing than the lightweight list tools—plan batching accordingly.
• Prefer structuredContent when present; it mirrors the JSON payload for schema-aware parsing.

signoff.overallStatusDetail: Phase 6 could not run via Context tools.execute; listing description was still updated successfully. Re-run execute validation after Auto Pay / wallet setup.
